release_notes: Bigger animation variety + wandering motion during the activity. Two complementary changes that together break up the 'same spot every time' feel of v1.0.49. (1) Each waypoint within an animation now has its OWN independent jitter (previously all spots in one play shared the same fj/yj so they shifted as a rigid unit; now per-spot jitter via _rng_seq with separate streams varies the layout itself). Amplitudes doubled to ±13-15% horizontal fraction and ±50-60px vertical so the figure can land anywhere from button-edge to canvas-edge instead of just nudging a fixed pattern. (2) New _drift(button, t, amp_x, amp_y) helper produces smooth pseudo-random position offsets — two sin waves per axis at randomized slow frequencies seeded from the per-play seed — to overlay on the figure during STATIONARY phases (touching toes, lifting weights, kick-line, etc.). Walks stay deterministic so paths don't wobble; only the 'doing the activity' phases get the wander. Stretches, jumping jacks, weights, dance, and cartwheel all updated.
